Assert whether number may code color in rgb

Source: R/common-fun-colors.R
assert_RGB_format.Rd

Assert whether number may code color in rgb

Usage

assert_RGB_format(x)

Arguments

x

numeric vector describing rgb color

Value

x invisible, if the check is not successful throws an error message.

On this page
